name: Create RPGLE Program
command: CRTBNDRPG PGM(&CURLIB/&NAME) SRCSTMF('&RELATIVEPATH') OPTION(*EVENTF) DBGVIEW(*SOURCE) TGTCCSID(*JOB)

name: Create RPGLE Module
command: CRTRPGMOD MODULE(&CURLIB/&NAME) SRCSTMF('&RELATIVEPATH') OPTION(*EVENTF) DBGVIEW(*SOURCE) TGTCCSID(*JOB)

name: Create SQLRPGLE Program
command:
CHGATR OBJ('&FULLPATH') ATR(*CCSID) VALUE(1252)
CRTSQLRPGI OBJ(&CURLIB/&NAME) SRCSTMF('&RELATIVEPATH') OPTION(*EVENTF) DBGVIEW(*SOURCE) CLOSQLCSR(*ENDMOD) CVTCCSID(*JOB) COMPILEOPT('TGTCCSID(*JOB)') RPGPPOPT(*LVL2)

name: Create SQLRPGLE Module
command:
CHGATR OBJ('&FULLPATH') ATR(*CCSID) VALUE(1252)
CRTSQLRPGI OBJ(&CURLIB/&NAME) SRCSTMF('&RELATIVEPATH') OBJTYPE(*MODULE) OPTION(*EVENTF) DBGVIEW(*SOURCE) CLOSQLCSR(*ENDMOD) CVTCCSID(*JOB) COMPILEOPT('TGTCCSID(*JOB)') RPGPPOPT(*LVL2)
